choose.when: SELECT count(*) FROM board2 WHERE title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
SELECT count(*) FROM board2 WHERE memberNo LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
SELECT count(*) FROM board2 WHERE content LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'

mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM rnum, b.*, m.memberId, m.memberName FROM (SELECT * FROM board2 ORDER BY boardno DESC) b JOIN member m ON b.memberno = m.memberNo) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{startRow} + #{pageSize} - 1

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM rnum, b.*, m.memberId, m.memberName FROM ( SELECT * FROM board2
title LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
memberNo LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
content LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%'
ORDER BY boardno DESC ) b JOIN member m ON b.memberno = m.memberNo ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{startRow} + #{pageSize} - 1
SELECT b.*, m.memberId, m.memberName FROM board2 b JOIN member m ON b.memberno = m.memberNo WHERE b.boardno = #{boardno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board2(boardno, title, content, createdate, memberno) VALUES(board_seq2.nextval, #{title}, #{content}, SYSDATE, #{memberno})
